div1.entryFree: Untwine, to cease winding round and clinging to: let the stinking elder, grief, u. his perishing root with the increasing vine, Cymb. IV, 2, 59 (cf. With). Used nonsensically by Pistol: let grievous, ghastly, gaping wounds u. the Sisters Three, H4B II, 4, 213 (a mutilated scrap of poetry).
